final:
module top_module(
    input wire [31:0] pc_plus_four,
    input wire [31:0] extended_times_four,
    output wire [31:0] branch_address
    );assign branch_address = pc_plus_four + extended_times_four;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      branch_address <= pc_plus_four - extended_times_four;
    end
  end

endmodule
